eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Delta, MI; at 07:45 AM ON MAY 1, 2026 Effective until 08:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Central Upper Peninsula Emergency Alert System originating from the Delta County Emergency Operations Center.   If this had been an actual emergency, such as a tornado, toxic material release, wide spread power loss, telephone outage or other state or local emergency that affects your safety, official messages would have followed the alert tone.  This concludes this test of the emergency alert system.
